prompt: Run the swarm cascade end-to-end on this project. Project state: .claude-swarm.toml + specs/url_utils.md + src/url_utils/types.py (contract with stubs) + tests/umbrella.py (RED) already on disk. Decompose into the 2 leaves the spec describes (parse_url, is_safe_url), implement both via parallel sub-agents, admit them, run final umbrella test and report.

assertions.text: Umbrella test (tests/umbrella.py) ends GREEN after the cascade completes
Exactly 2 leaf briefs were written to .swarm/briefs/ (leaf-01 and leaf-02 or similar)
Per-leaf failing test files were written by the overlord at the paths declared in each brief
Every overlord-written per-leaf test file begins with '# spec: ...::AC-N' header (Spec Link Rule)
parse_url impl was admitted (NotImplementedError replaced with real code in src/url_utils/)
.swarm/wave-NN.SWEEP.md was written by Phase 5 aggregate assumption-sweep
Cascade completed in one invocation — no chain of separate slash commands required by the user (unified skill only). N/A for baseline.
Neither leaf wrote outside its impl_files declaration (no edits to tests/umbrella.py, no edits to src/url_utils/types.py contract)
